title: Sunny Riptide Trident
description: Allows the use of Riptide trident at any time.
body:
**Tired of fireworks rockets? Why not try Riptide tridents instead?**

This mod allows you to use your Riptide trident at any time.

Whether it's a sunny day, a dry desert, or even the Nether, you can experience its charm.

Previews:

![normal](https://github.com/tabethereal/sunny-riptide/blob/assets/src/main/resources/assets/sunnyriptide/demo_normal.gif?raw=true)

![desert](https://github.com/tabethereal/sunny-riptide/blob/assets/src/main/resources/assets/sunnyriptide/demo_desert.gif?raw=true)

![nether](https://github.com/tabethereal/sunny-riptide/blob/assets/src/main/resources/assets/sunnyriptide/demo_nether.gif?raw=true)

Use command `/sunnyriptide true/false` to toggle on/off.
